defs: A letter, character, or mark used to represent a particular sound.
quotes: Phonograms are of three kinds: (1) Verbal signs, which stand for entire words; (2) Syllabic signs, which stand for the articulations of which words are composed; (3) Alphabetic signs, or letters, which represent the elementary sounds into which the syllable can be resolved.

defs: A record of sounds made by a phonograph.
